title: ardisia zollingeri var. polyneura
intro: Ardisia zollingeri var. polyneura, also known as the Polyneura ardisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Ardisia zollingeri var. polyneura include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
